chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 484 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2574/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.2575/2022. 18.11.2025 Mr. Munawwar Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel states that the questions of law proposed for determination have already been decided against the applicant department vide Supreme Court judgment reported as 2025 SCMR 969. In view hereof, the reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
